title: March 25
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}
'''March 25''' is the 84th day of the year (85th in leap years). There are 281 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 36|''Star Wars'' (1977) 36]] published.
*[[1998]] – [[The Last Command 4|''The Last Command'' 4]] published.
*[[2005]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 25]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*2005 – "[[Spare Parts (short story)|Spare Parts]]" published on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[2007]] – [[Cailey Fleming]] is born.
*2007 – ''[[Boba Fett: Man with a Mission]]'' published.
*[[2009]] – [[Legacy (2006) 34|''Legacy'' (2006) 34]] published.
*[[2010]] – "[[The Old Republic: Smuggler's Vanguard]]" released exclusively on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2015]] – [[Darth Vader (2015) 3|''Darth Vader'' (2015) 3]] published.
*2015 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 3|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 3]] published in the United Kingdom.
*[[2017]] – "[[Zero Hour]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2020]] – [[Bounty Hunters 2|''Bounty Hunters'' 2]] published.
*[[2025]] – ''[[Star Wars Legends: The Old Republic Omnibus Vol. 1]]'' reprinted.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars: Inquisitors (trade paperback)]]'' published.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars Young Jedi Adventures Ultimate Sticker Collection]]'' published.
*[[2026]] – [[The High Republic Adventures – Pathfinders 1|''The High Republic Adventures – Pathfinders'' 1]] to be published.
<noinclude>
